assertions.title: Client secret creation returns ephemeral auth and effective session
assertions.reason: The live smoke passed (`test live_realtime_text_smoke_uses_client_secret_and_ga_text_events ... ok`) and printed `live realtime client-secret request id: 9d95308f-8e98-4d8c-8afc-8903defd1223` plus `live realtime session id: sess_DRZyWY46PSVBgYZRbiXYg`, showing client-secret creation succeeded and the issued secret opened a live session.

assertions.title: WebSocket connect builds the correct Realtime target and auth inputs
assertions.reason: The live smoke passed while printing `live realtime consumer client api_key field: Some("")` and a live session id, showing the connection succeeded using the ephemeral client secret rather than a reusable server API key.

assertions.title: Session update round-trips effective GA session state
assertions.reason: The live smoke finished `... ok`; this smoke only reaches completion if `session.update` receives a decodable `session.updated` event without a live realtime error.

assertions.title: Response creation decodes the canonical GA text event sequence
assertions.reason: The live smoke passed and printed `live realtime final text: hi`; this smoke only completes after observing the GA `response.output_text.*` flow and terminal `response.done`.

assertions.title: GA event names follow the current published surface, not stale beta aliases
assertions.reason: The live smoke passed without surfacing stale beta aliases; this smoke explicitly fails on `response.text.delta` or `response.text.done`, so the successful `... ok` run confirms current GA naming for this live session.

assertions.title: Connection Bootstrap Surfaces Session Creation and Clean Shutdown
assertions.reason: The live smoke passed after printing `live realtime session id: sess_DRZyWY46PSVBgYZRbiXYg`; this smoke only succeeds if it receives the bootstrap session-created event and closes the websocket cleanly.
